title: taraxacum rhodocarpum
intro: Taraxacum rhodocarpum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum rhodocarpum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
